### VARIANCE OVER TIME
Similar to Variance, but it is used to calculate the variance over a time series of values from the given field.

```esql
TS k8s
| STATS avg_var_cost=AVG(VARIANCE_OVER_TIME(network.cost)) BY cluster, time_bucket = TBUCKET(1minute)
```
